ROVARK

SCAN - MAP - SURVIVE

SURVIVE
Enemy rovers patrol the map.
Collect beacons, find the real exit.
Watch out for fake exits.
High risk · High reward
EXPLORE
No enemies. No fake exits.
Map the environment freely.
Collect all beacons, find the exit.
Pure exploration
Press SPACE to use the Lidar scanner.
Use W/A/S/D to move and V for camera view.
Find the Exit to escape. Press M to toggle audio - sound hints enemy proximity.

FOR CHALLENGERS — Survive - First person view - No audio
TOP MAP

SCORE 0
